languages.text: Trazyn marks up to 3 enemies for his inevitable judgement. At the end of their next turn lightning strikes between them removing THP and dealing shock damage. This ability can be used even if Trazyn is recovering from {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Eternal Protocol{/g}

traits.locale_text: Trazyn marks up to 3 enemies for his inevitable judgement. At the end of their next turn lightning strikes between them removing THP and dealing shock damage. This ability can be used even if Trazyn is recovering from {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Eternal Protocol{/g}

languages.text: Trazyn marks up to 3 targets. At the end of a marked target's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, lightning emanates from it, striking other conscious targets, removing their {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} and dealing 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}. This ability can be used even if Trazyn uses {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Eternity Protocols{/g}
languages.original_text: Trazyn marks up to 3 enemies for his inevitable judgement. At the end of their next turn lightning strikes between them removing THP and dealing shock damage. This ability can be used even if Trazyn is recovering from {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Eternal Protocol{/g}

traits.locale_text: Tranzyn marks 2-3 targets. At the end of a marked target's next turn, lightning strikes from it toward other conscious targets, removing their temporary wounds and dealing 35 shock damage with 50% armour penetration. This ability can be used even if Trazyn uses the {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Eternity Protocols{/g}

Trazyn marks up to 3 targets. At the end of a marked target's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, lightning emanates from it, striking other conscious targets, removing their {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} and dealing 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}. This ability can be used even if Trazyn uses {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Eternity Protocols{/g}

At the end of a marked target's next turn, lightning emanates from it, striking other conscious targets, removing their temporary wounds and dealing 35 shock damage with 50% armour penetration. This ability can be used even if Trazyn uses {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Eternity Protocols{/g}

Trazyn marks 2-3 targets. At the end of a marked target's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, lightning emanates from it, striking other conscious targets, removing their {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} and dealing 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}. This ability can be used even if Trazyn uses {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Eternity Protocols{/g}

languages.text: Тразин отмечает 2 или 3 цели. В конце своего следующего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} такая цель испускает молнию, которая поражает другие отмеченные цели, снимает их {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}временное здоровье{/g} и наносит 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} с {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробитием брони{/g} 50%. Эта способность может применяться, даже если Тразин активировал {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Протоколы вечности{/g}.
languages.original_text: Trazyn marks 2-3 targets. At the end of a marked target's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, lightning emanates from it, striking other conscious targets, removing their {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} and dealing 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}. This ability can be used even if Trazyn uses {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Eternity Protocols{/g}

traits.locale_text: Тразин отмечает 2 или 3 цели. В конце своего следующего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} такая цель испускает молнию, которая поражает другие отмеченные цели, снимает их {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}временное здоровье{/g} и наносит 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} с {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробитием брони{/g} 50%. Эта способность может применяться, даже если Тразин активировал {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Протоколы вечности{/g}.

Тразин отмечает 2 или 3 цели. В конце своего следующего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} такая цель испускает молнию, которая поражает другие отмеченные цели, снимает их {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}временное здоровье{/g} и наносит 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} с {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробитием брони{/g} 50%. Эта способность может применяться, даже если Тразин активировал {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Протоколы вечности{/g}.

languages.text: Trazyn marque jusqu'à 3 cibles. À la fin du prochain {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} d'une cible marquée, un éclair surgit de sa personne et frappe d'autres cibles conscientes, supprimant leurs {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}blessures temporaires{/g} et infligeant 35 points de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} avec 50 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g}. Cette capacité peut être utilisée même si Trazyn se sert de {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Protocoles d'éternité{/g}.
languages.original_text: Trazyn marks up to 3 targets. At the end of a marked target's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, lightning emanates from it, striking other conscious targets, removing their {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} and dealing 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}. This ability can be used even if Trazyn uses {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Eternity Protocols{/g}

traits.locale_text: Trazyn marque jusqu'à 3 cibles. À la fin du prochain {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} d'une cible marquée, un éclair surgit de sa personne et frappe d'autres cibles conscientes, supprimant leurs {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}blessures temporaires{/g} et infligeant 35 points de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} avec 50 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g}. Cette capacité peut être utilisée même si Trazyn se sert de {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Protocoles d'éternité{/g}.

languages.text: Trazyn, en fazla 3 hedefi işaretler. İşaretli bir hedefin bir sonraki {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} sonunda hedeften yıldırım çıkar. Bu yıldırım, baygın olmayan diğer hedefleri çarparak {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}geçici sağlık{/g} puanlarını ortadan kaldırır ve %50 {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarı{/g} verir. Trazyn, {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Ebediyet Protokolleri{/g} kullansa bile bu kabiliyet kullanılabilir.
languages.original_text: Trazyn marks up to 3 targets. At the end of a marked target's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, lightning emanates from it, striking other conscious targets, removing their {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} and dealing 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}. This ability can be used even if Trazyn uses {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Eternity Protocols{/g}

traits.locale_text: Trazyn, en fazla 3 hedefi işaretler. İşaretli bir hedefin bir sonraki {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} sonunda hedeften yıldırım çıkar. Bu yıldırım, baygın olmayan diğer hedefleri çarparak {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}geçici sağlık{/g} puanlarını ortadan kaldırır ve %50 {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarı{/g} verir. Trazyn, {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Ebediyet Protokolleri{/g} kullansa bile bu kabiliyet kullanılabilir.

languages.text: 特拉金最多标记3个目标。每个被标记目标的下一{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束时，闪电会从该目标身上迸发，打击其他有意识的目标，移除他们的{g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}临时生命值{/g}，并造成附带50%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的35点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}。即使特拉金使用了{g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}永恒协议{/g}，此能力仍可使用。
languages.original_text: Trazyn marks up to 3 targets. At the end of a marked target's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, lightning emanates from it, striking other conscious targets, removing their {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} and dealing 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}. This ability can be used even if Trazyn uses {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Eternity Protocols{/g}

traits.locale_text: 特拉金最多标记3个目标。每个被标记目标的下一{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束时，闪电会从该目标身上迸发，打击其他有意识的目标，移除他们的{g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}临时生命值{/g}，并造成附带50%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的35点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}。即使特拉金使用了{g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}永恒协议{/g}，此能力仍可使用。

languages.text: Trazyn marca a hasta 3 objetivos. Al final del próximo {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} de un objetivo marcado, este emite una descarga eléctrica que golpea a otros objetivos conscientes, eliminando sus {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}heridas temporales{/g} e infligiendo 35 de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} con un 50 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g}. Esta capacidad puede utilizarse incluso aunque Trazyn haya usado {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Protocolos de eternidad{/g}.
languages.original_text: Trazyn marks up to 3 targets. At the end of a marked target's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, lightning emanates from it, striking other conscious targets, removing their {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} and dealing 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}. This ability can be used even if Trazyn uses {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Eternity Protocols{/g}

traits.locale_text: Trazyn marca a hasta 3 objetivos. Al final del próximo {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} de un objetivo marcado, este emite una descarga eléctrica que golpea a otros objetivos conscientes, eliminando sus {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}heridas temporales{/g} e infligiendo 35 de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} con un 50 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g}. Esta capacidad puede utilizarse incluso aunque Trazyn haya usado {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Protocolos de eternidad{/g}.

languages.text: Trazyn markiert bis zu to 3 Ziele. Am Ende des nächsten {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} eines markierten Ziels löst sich aus diesem ein Blitz, der andere Ziele bei Bewusstsein trifft, ihre {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporären Wunden{/g} entfernt und 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} mit 50 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g} verursacht. Diese Fähigkeit kann auch dann verwendet werden, wenn Trazyn {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Ewigkeitsprotokolle{/g} einsetzt.
languages.original_text: Trazyn marks up to 3 targets. At the end of a marked target's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, lightning emanates from it, striking other conscious targets, removing their {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} and dealing 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}. This ability can be used even if Trazyn uses {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Eternity Protocols{/g}

traits.locale_text: Trazyn markiert bis zu to 3 Ziele. Am Ende des nächsten {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} eines markierten Ziels löst sich aus diesem ein Blitz, der andere Ziele bei Bewusstsein trifft, ihre {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporären Wunden{/g} entfernt und 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} mit 50 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g} verursacht. Diese Fähigkeit kann auch dann verwendet werden, wenn Trazyn {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Ewigkeitsprotokolle{/g} einsetzt.

languages.text: トラズンは最大3体の標的をマークする。マークされた標的の次の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}終了時に、その標的から雷が放たれ、他の意識のある標的を攻撃し、{g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}一時傷{/g}を回復させ、50%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}率で35の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}を与える。この能力は、トラズンが「{g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}永遠の契約{/g}」を使用している場合でも使用可能。
languages.original_text: Trazyn marks up to 3 targets. At the end of a marked target's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, lightning emanates from it, striking other conscious targets, removing their {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} and dealing 35 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}. This ability can be used even if Trazyn uses {g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}Eternity Protocols{/g}

traits.locale_text: トラズンは最大3体の標的をマークする。マークされた標的の次の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}終了時に、その標的から雷が放たれ、他の意識のある標的を攻撃し、{g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}一時傷{/g}を回復させ、50%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}率で35の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}を与える。この能力は、トラズンが「{g|f:56e88667045b4591af86fa14e1760e8e}永遠の契約{/g}」を使用している場合でも使用可能。
